title: Armx
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:Armx.jpg]] |name=Armx |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer=[[MerenData/Legends|MerenData]] |line= |model= |class=[[RM-2020 espionage droid]] (modified) |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Masculine programming]] |pronouns=new |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] }} {{Quote|For want of a screw a droid was lost,
For want of a droid a sensor failed,
For want of a sensor a power cell died,
For want of a power cell a blaster malfunctioned,
For want of a blaster I captured Gavron Noff.
Data evaluation and conclusion: Gavron Noff screwed up...|Armx, epitaph for captured bounty|''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''}} '''Armx''' was a modified [[MerenData/Legends|MerenData]] [[RM-2020 espionage droid]] turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] known for his [[Poet/Legends|poetry]], who often wrote epitaphs for his acquisitions. On one occasion he wrote such an epitaph about his capture of the target [[Gavron Noff]]. Armx was originally assigned to an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Naval]] base on [[Gestrex III]] before it was destroyed by forces of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. {{Droid-stub}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Droids of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Droids with masculine programming]] [[Category:Imperial Intelligence personnel of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:RM-2020 espionage droids]]
